record.field:
Dear ${object.employee_user_id.name},

We are excited to inform you that you have been nominated to attend the ${object.training_card_id.program}, in recognition of your exceptional performance and dedication. Please book your calendars.

If you are available, kindly click on the following link and confirm your availability.

Link: https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=employee.training.contract&menu_id=1221&action=1953

Best Regards,
HR Dept.

Dear ${object.user_id.name},

The nominated training ${object.training_card_id.program} has been accepted by employee ${object.employee_user_id.name}

Link : https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=employee.training.contract&menu_id=1221&action=1953

Best Regards,
ERP Automatic Email

Dear ${object.user_id.name},

The nominated training ${object.training_card_id.program} has been rejected by employee ${object.employee_user_id.name}

Link : https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=employee.training.contract&menu_id=1221&action=1953

Best Regards,
ERP Automatic Email

Dear ${object.employee_user_id.name},

This is a reminder that you have a scheduled training on ${object.training_card_id.program}. Please confirm your availability by clicking the below link to either accept or reject the training schedule.

Link : https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=employee.training.contract&menu_id=1221&action=1953

Your prompt response would be appreciated.

Best Regards,
HR Team

Dear ${object.employee_user_id.name},

This is a reminder that you have to mark the training on ${object.training_card_id.program} is completed. Please mark as completed by clicking the below link.

Link : https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=employee.training.contract&menu_id=1221&action=1953

Your prompt response would be appreciated.

Best Regards,
HR Team
KSA - Training Completion HR Validation Email

Dear ${object.user_id.name},

The nominated training ${object.training_card_id.program} has been completed by employee ${object.employee_user_id.name}. Kindly do the validation process

Link : https://erp.betait.net/web?#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=employee.training.contract&menu_id=1221&action=1953

Best Regards,
ERP Automatic Email
